title: alyssum montanum var. diffusum
intro: Alyssum montanum var. diffusum, also known as mountain alyssum, is a flowering plant in the mustard family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of mountain alyssum include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and its antiseptic properties make it useful for wound healing. Mountain alyssum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it has been used in herbal remedies for centuries.
